# PuzOdyssey

> PuzOdyssey is a premium wooden puzzle board brand for retailers, online sellers, and distributors serving serious puzzlers in the United States, Canada, and Europe.

Official website: https://puzodyssey.com/
Wholesale contact: partnerships@puzodyssey.com

PuzOdyssey creates rotating and tilting wooden puzzle boards for long puzzle projects. The collection includes puzzle boards for 1,000-piece, 1,500-piece, and 2,000-piece puzzles, with features such as adjustable tilt, 360-degree rotation, built-in drawers, a felt puzzle surface, and a protective cover.

The brand is positioned for B2B partners who want a premium, giftable puzzle board product for retail shelves, online stores, and regional distribution networks.

## Products

- [Wholesale puzzle boards](https://puzodyssey.com/wholesale-puzzle-boards.html): B2B overview for retailers and online sellers considering PuzOdyssey puzzle boards.
- [Puzzle board distributor partnerships](https://puzodyssey.com/puzzle-board-distributor.html): Distribution-focused information for regional partners.
- [Rotating and tilting puzzle board features](https://puzodyssey.com/rotating-tilting-puzzle-board.html): Feature overview covering rotation, tilt, drawers, cover, and felt surface.
- [Puzzle board sizes](https://puzodyssey.com/puzzle-board-sizes.html): Size overview for 1,000-piece, 1,500-piece, and 2,000-piece puzzle boards.

## Markets

- United States
- Canada
- Europe

PuzOdyssey welcomes wholesale conversations with retailers, online sellers, and distributors in these markets.

## Key Information

- Brand name: PuzOdyssey
- Category: premium wooden puzzle boards
- Primary audience: retailers, distributors, online sellers, and serious puzzlers
- Product sizes: 1,000-piece, 1,500-piece, and 2,000-piece puzzle boards
- Core features: adjustable tilt, 360-degree rotation, built-in drawers, felt puzzle surface, protective cover
- Contact email: partnerships@puzodyssey.com

## What We Do Not Claim

- PuzOdyssey does not publish fixed wholesale pricing, MOQ, delivery timelines, local warehouse availability, certifications, or exclusive territory terms on this website.
- Buyers should contact partnerships@puzodyssey.com for current wholesale terms, samples, distribution discussions, and product details.
